dubbing create: Create a dubbing job from a local file (--file) or URL (--source-url). Required: --target-lang. Optional: --source-lang, --num-speakers, --watermark, --start-time, --end-time, --highest-resolution, --drop-background-audio, --use-profanity-filter, --dubbing-studio, --disable-voice-cloning, --mode {automatic|manual}. Returns a dubbing_id to poll via `dubbing show`.
dubbing show <dubbing_id>: Get a dubbing job's status and language progress (aliases: get).
dubbing delete <dubbing_id> --yes: Delete a dubbing job (aliases: rm). --yes is required.
dubbing get-audio <dubbing_id> <language: Download the dubbed audio/video bytes for a language. --output <path> to pick the filename (default dub_<id>_<lang>.mp4).
dubbing get-transcript <dubbing_id> <lan: Download the transcript in the chosen format via the new /transcript/{lang}/format/{fmt} endpoint. --output <path> to pick the filename.
dubbing resource transcribe <dubbing_id>: Re-run transcription on a Studio-mode dub. Pass --patch <file.json> for body overrides.
dubbing resource translate <dubbing_id>: Re-run translation for a Studio-mode dub. Pass --patch <file.json> for body overrides.
dubbing resource dub <dubbing_id>: Re-run the dub step for a Studio-mode dub. Pass --patch <file.json> for body overrides.
dubbing resource render <dubbing_id> <la: Re-render the dubbed output for a target language. Pass --patch <file.json> for body overrides.
dubbing resource migrate-segments <dubbi: Migrate legacy segment metadata to the current schema. Pass --patch <file.json> for body overrides.
